accepted_if.pl: :attribute musi zostać zaakceptowany, gdy :other ma wartość :value.
accepted_if.en: The :attribute field must be accepted when :other is :value.

active_url.en: The :attribute field must be a valid URL.

after.en: The :attribute field must be a date after :date.

after_or_equal.pl: :attribute musi być datą nie wcześniejszą niż :date.
after_or_equal.en: The :attribute field must be a date after or equal to :date.

alpha.en: The :attribute field must only contain letters.

alpha_dash.pl: :attribute może zawierać tylko litery, cyfry, myślniki i podkreślenia.
alpha_dash.en: The :attribute field must only contain letters, numbers, dashes, and underscores.

alpha_num.pl: :attribute może zawierać tylko litery i cyfry.
alpha_num.en: The :attribute field must only contain letters and numbers.

array.en: The :attribute field must be an array.

ascii.pl: :attribute może zawierać tylko jednobajtowe znaki alfanumeryczne i symbole.
ascii.en: The :attribute field must only contain single-byte alphanumeric characters and symbols.

before.en: The :attribute field must be a date before :date.

before_or_equal.pl: :attribute musi być datą nie późniejszą niż :date.
before_or_equal.en: The :attribute field must be a date before or equal to :date.

array.en: The :attribute field must have between :min and :max items.

file.en: The :attribute field must be between :min and :max kilobytes.

numeric.en: The :attribute field must be between :min and :max.

string.en: The :attribute field must be between :min and :max characters.

boolean.pl: Pole :attribute musi być prawdą lub fałszem.
boolean.en: The :attribute field must be true or false.

confirmed.en: The :attribute field confirmation does not match.

after_or_equal.pl: Data końca etapu musi być późniejsza niż data początku.
after_or_equal.en: The stage end date must be later than the start date.

date.en: The :attribute field must be a valid date.

date_equals.en: The :attribute field must be a date equal to :date.

date_format.en: The :attribute field must match the format :format.

decimal.en: The :attribute field must have :decimal decimal places.

declined_if.pl: :attribute musi zostać odrzucony, gdy :other ma wartość :value.
declined_if.en: The :attribute field must be declined when :other is :value.

different.en: The :attribute field and :other must be different.

digits_between.en: The :attribute field must be between :min and :max digits.

dimensions.en: The :attribute field has invalid image dimensions.

distinct.en: The :attribute field has a duplicate value.

doesnt_end_with.pl: :attribute nie może kończyć się jednym z następujących: :values.
doesnt_end_with.en: The :attribute field must not end with one of the following: :values.

doesnt_start_with.pl: :attribute nie może zaczynać się od jednego z następujących: :values.
doesnt_start_with.en: The :attribute field must not start with one of the following: :values.

email.en: The :attribute field must be a valid email address.

ends_with.pl: :attribute musi kończyć się jednym z następujących: :values.
ends_with.en: The :attribute field must end with one of the following: :values.

file.en: The :attribute field must be a file.

filled.en: The :attribute field must have a value.

array.en: The :attribute field must have more than :value items.

file.en: The :attribute field must be greater than :value kilobytes.

numeric.en: The :attribute field must be greater than :value.

string.en: The :attribute field must be greater than :value characters.

array.en: The :attribute field must have :value items or more.

file.pl: :attribute musi być większy lub równy :value kilobajtów.
file.en: The :attribute field must be greater than or equal to :value kilobytes.

numeric.en: The :attribute field must be greater than or equal to :value.

string.pl: :attribute musi być dłuższy lub równy :value znaków.
string.en: The :attribute field must be greater than or equal to :value characters.

image.en: The :attribute field must be an image.

integer.en: The :attribute field must be an integer.

ip.en: The :attribute field must be a valid IP address.

ipv4.en: The :attribute field must be a valid IPv4 address.

ipv6.en: The :attribute field must be a valid IPv6 address.

json.en: The :attribute field must be a valid JSON string.

array.en: The :attribute field must have less than :value items.

file.en: The :attribute field must be less than :value kilobytes.

numeric.en: The :attribute field must be less than :value.

string.en: The :attribute field must be less than :value characters.

array.pl: :attribute nie może mieć więcej niż :value elementów.
array.en: The :attribute field must not have more than :value items.

file.pl: :attribute musi być mniejszy lub równy :value kilobajtów.
file.en: The :attribute field must be less than or equal to :value kilobytes.

numeric.en: The :attribute field must be less than or equal to :value.

string.pl: :attribute musi być krótszy lub równy :value znaków.
string.en: The :attribute field must be less than or equal to :value characters.

mac_address.en: The :attribute field must be a valid MAC address.

max_digits.pl: :attribute nie może mieć więcej niż :max cyfr.
max_digits.en: The :attribute field must not have more than :max digits.

array.pl: :attribute nie może mieć więcej niż :max elementów.
array.en: The :attribute field must not have more than :max items.

file.pl: :attribute nie może być większy niż :max kilobajtów.
file.en: The :attribute field must not be greater than :max kilobytes.

numeric.en: The :attribute field must not be greater than :max.

string.pl: :attribute nie może być dłuższy niż :max znaków.
string.en: The :attribute field must not be greater than :max characters.

mimes.en: The :attribute field must be a file of type: :values.

mimetypes.en: The :attribute field must be a file of type: :values.

min_digits.en: The :attribute field must have at least :min digits.

array.en: The :attribute field must have at least :min items.

file.en: The :attribute field must be at least :min kilobytes.

numeric.en: The :attribute field must be at least :min.

string.en: The :attribute field must be at least :min characters.

multiple_of.en: The :attribute field must be a multiple of :value.

numeric.en: The :attribute field must be a number.

letters.pl: :attribute musi zawierać co najmniej jedną literę.
letters.en: The :attribute field must contain at least one letter.

mixed.pl: :attribute musi zawierać co najmniej jedną dużą i jedną małą literę.
mixed.en: The :attribute field must contain at least one uppercase and one lowercase letter.

numbers.pl: :attribute musi zawierać co najmniej jedną cyfrę.
numbers.en: The :attribute field must contain at least one number.

symbols.pl: :attribute musi zawierać co najmniej jeden symbol.
symbols.en: The :attribute field must contain at least one symbol.

uncompromised.pl: Podany :attribute pojawił się w wycieku danych. Proszę użyć innego :attribute.
uncompromised.en: The given :attribute has appeared in a data leak. Please choose a different :attribute.

prohibited_if.pl: Pole :attribute jest zabronione, gdy :other ma wartość :value.
prohibited_if.en: The :attribute field is prohibited when :other is :value.

prohibited_unless.pl: Pole :attribute jest zabronione, chyba że :other znajduje się w :values.
prohibited_unless.en: The :attribute field is prohibited unless :other is in :values.

prohibits.en: The :attribute field prohibits :other from being present.

required_array_keys.en: The :attribute field must contain entries for: :values.

required_if.pl: Pole :attribute jest wymagane, gdy :other ma wartość :value.
required_if.en: The :attribute field is required when :other is :value.

required_if_accepted.pl: Pole :attribute jest wymagane, gdy :other jest zaakceptowane.
required_if_accepted.en: The :attribute field is required when :other is accepted.

required_unless.pl: Pole :attribute jest wymagane, chyba że :other znajduje się w :values.
required_unless.en: The :attribute field is required unless :other is in :values.

required_with.pl: Pole :attribute jest wymagane, gdy :values jest obecne.
required_with.en: The :attribute field is required when :values is present.

required_with_all.pl: Pole :attribute jest wymagane, gdy :values są obecne.
required_with_all.en: The :attribute field is required when :values are present.

required_without.pl: Pole :attribute jest wymagane, gdy :values nie jest obecne.
required_without.en: The :attribute field is required when :values is not present.

required_without_all.pl: Pole :attribute jest wymagane, gdy żadne z :values nie są obecne.
required_without_all.en: The :attribute field is required when none of :values are present.

starts_with.pl: :attribute musi zaczynać się jednym z następujących: :values.
starts_with.en: The :attribute field must start with one of the following: :values.

string.en: The :attribute field must be a string.

timezone.en: The :attribute field must be a valid timezone.

ulid.en: The :attribute field must be a valid ULID.

url.en: The :attribute field must be a valid URL.

uuid.en: The :attribute field must be a valid UUID.
